title: Safety Status Feedback
subtitle: Please click a button below to confirm your safety status

safe.label: I am Safe
safe.description: I am currently safe and do not need assistance

needHelp.label: I Need Help
needHelp.description: I am in an emergency and need assistance

notApplicable.label: Not in UAE
notApplicable.description: I am currently not in the affected area

submitted.title: Feedback Submitted
submitted.message: Thank you. Your safety status has been recorded.

expired.title: Event Closed
expired.message: This safety check event has ended. Feedback is no longer accepted.

notFound.title: Event Not Found
notFound.message: Event not found or has been deleted

hint: You can update your status by clicking again if needed
